violations.description: General employee cleanliness. — --Food employee did not wash hands as necessary when changing gloves.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --In-use utensil was not properly stored during pauses in food preparation or dispensing. Observed scoop handles stored in the food.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required.
General employee practices. — --Food employee observed drinking/using open beverage container outside of designated area. Observed 2 employees eating in the kitchen.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --In-use utensil was not properly stored during pauses in food preparation or dispensing. Observed scoop handles stored in the diced fruits.
Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was reused or used more than one time. Single use container being used as a scoop in the brussel sprouts.
